name: feishu-user-mcp
description: Send Feishu/Lark messages as your personal identity (not a bot) using reverse-engineered Protobuf protocol

tools.name: send_to_user
tools.description: Search user by name and send message in one step

tools.name: send_to_group
tools.description: Search group by name and send message in one step

tools.name: send_as_user
tools.description: Send message to any chat by chat ID

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search users, bots, and groups by keyword

tools.name: create_p2p_chat
tools.description: Create or get a direct message chat
